name: Operator Proof Cockpit
description: A static review cockpit for a B2B AI workflow pilot.
brief: Create a product/service pilot landing page for founders and technical operators reviewing an AI agent workflow dashboard with deploy evidence, QA status, and proof artifacts.
audience: B2B founders evaluating an AI workflow pilot
Technical operators who need QA, deploy, and proof artifacts before review

sections.title: Workflow review path
sections.body: Show how reviewers move from brief to QA evidence, deploy status, and next-step decision.

sections.title: Boundary checks
sections.body: Make static-safe limits, unsupported claims, and approval requirements visible.

proofArtifacts.label: QA transcript
proofArtifacts.body: Repo-local QA commands and deploy verification are recorded for reviewers.

proofArtifacts.label: Deployment artifact
proofArtifacts.body: GitHub Pages output is linked with static contracts and no live telemetry.
